title: psychotria butayei var. glabra
intro: Psychotria butayei var. glabra is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is a variety of the Psychotria butayei plant, which belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is a shrub that is native to the Philippines and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Psychotria butayei var. glabra include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and respiratory issues.
